reasoning: The control CP-10(2) focuses on system recovery and transaction recovery, which in a Kubernetes context can be mapped to ensuring that critical data such as etcd (which stores cluster state) is backed up and that there are policies in place for recovering workloads and configurations. While Kubernetes does not handle transaction recovery in the same way as a database, ensuring etcd backups and having disaster recovery policies for pods and cluster configurations can help achieve similar objectives.
title: System Recovery And Reconstitution - System recovery and reconstitution | transaction recovery implement transaction
